title: API /images/create missing parameters
body:
For compatibility, the following query parameters should be implemented:

- repo
- message
- platform

Additionally, the type of the HTTP body when using `fromImage` should be type `string` format `binary`.

See https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/9126

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I've begun to work on this one, will ping with any questions!
